{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Web / Mobile Application Developer",
  "description": "Glone General Merchandize - Our client, a Telecommunication Company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Web / Mobile Application Developer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Information Systems &amp; Technology (Software Development Unit)

Job Summary


	We are looking for a skilled developer to design, build, and maintain web and mobile applications, ensuring high performance and user-friendly experiences.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, test, and maintain web/mobile applications
	Write clean, efficient, and scalable code
	Analyze user requirements and translate into technical solutions
	Perform debugging, testing, and system improvements
	Prepare technical documentation (design, specs, reports)
	Collaborate with users and internal teams
	Provide regular project updates


Requirements


	Degree in Computer Science or related fields
	Experience in software development and application design
	Strong knowledge of PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS
	Familiarity with frameworks (e.g., Laravel, Zend, Rails)
	Experience with version control tools (Git, SVN)
	Knowledge of mobile and responsive design


Skills:


	Strong problem-solving ability
	Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines
	Good communication and teamwork skills
	Willingness to learn new technologies.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;in PDF&nbsp;to:&nbsp;ggmerchandize@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note
Submit the following information in the body of the email to help us determine your alignment with the job requirements:


	Current Salary (Net).
	Expected Salary (Net).
	Annual Net Salary.
	Notice Period.
	Age / Date of Birth.
",

Web / Mobile Application Developer Job at Glone General Merchandize




        
    

        
        Glone General Merchandize - Our client, a Telecommunication Company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Web / Mobile Application Developer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Information Systems & Technology (Software Development Unit)

Job Summary


	We are looking for a skilled developer to design, build, and maintain web and mobile applications, ensuring high performance and user-friendly experiences.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop, test, and maintain web/mobile applications
	Write clean, efficient, and scalable code
	Analyze user requirements and translate into technical solutions
	Perform debugging, testing, and system improvements
	Prepare technical documentation (design, specs, reports)
	Collaborate with users and internal teams
	Provide regular project updates


Requirements


	Degree in Computer Science or related fields
	Experience in software development and application design
	Strong knowledge of PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS
	Familiarity with frameworks (e.g., Laravel, Zend, Rails)
	Experience with version control tools (Git, SVN)
	Knowledge of mobile and responsive design


Skills:


	Strong problem-solving ability
	Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines
	Good communication and teamwork skills
	Willingness to learn new technologies.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in PDF to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note
Submit the following information in the body of the email to help us determine your alignment with the job requirements:


	Current Salary (Net).
	Expected Salary (Net).
	Annual Net Salary.
	Notice Period.
	Age / Date of Birth.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "title": "Head, Admin and Facility Management",
  "description": "Prysm Facility Services Limited is a Facility Management Company in Lagos, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Admin and Facility Management

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties


	Foster a positive work culture by promoting company values, communication, and employee engagement
	Develop and manage budgets, plans, and performance metrics to achieve organizational goals
	Implement and enforce policies related to administration, fleet management, and Health &amp; Safety
	Drive strategic and innovative initiatives to support business growth
	Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders including clients, government authorities, and partners
	Ensure ethical business practices and enhance the company&rsquo;s corporate image
	Manage vendor onboarding and relationships
	Oversee rent collection and preparation of client service charges
	Supervise office renovations, refurbishments, and general facility management
	Provide leadership and supervision to Admin Officers
	Stay updated with industry trends through continuous professional development.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 5 - 10 years of experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;zhc@prysmfacilities.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Head, Admin and Facility Management Job at Prysm Facility Services Limited




        
    

        
        Prysm Facility Services Limited is a Facility Management Company in Lagos, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Admin and Facility Management

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Foster a positive work culture by promoting company values, communication, and employee engagement
	Develop and manage budgets, plans, and performance metrics to achieve organizational goals
	Implement and enforce policies related to administration, fleet management, and Health & Safety
	Drive strategic and innovative initiatives to support business growth
	Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders including clients, government authorities, and partners
	Ensure ethical business practices and enhance the company’s corporate image
	Manage vendor onboarding and relationships
	Oversee rent collection and preparation of client service charges
	Supervise office renovations, refurbishments, and general facility management
	Provide leadership and supervision to Admin Officers
	Stay updated with industry trends through continuous professional development.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 5 - 10 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Manager",
  "description": "Levitikal Group is a leading conglomerate driving progress and development across Nigeria. With a diverse portfolio spanning real estate, construction, energy, agriculture, and hospitality, they are committed to delivering exceptional value to their stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Oversee production processes and quality control
	Improve existing formulations for cost efficiency, performance, and sustainability.
	Provide technical support to sales and operations teams
	Ensure compliance with safety and operational standards
	Establish and maintain quality standards for raw materials, in-process production, and finished goods.
	Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations (e.g., VOC limits, environmental and safety standards).
	Investigate and resolve quality issues and customer complaints.
	Provide technical guidance to sales, production, and customer service teams.
	Support key customers with product application, troubleshooting, and performance optimization.
	Collaborate with manufacturing to ensure efficient and consistent production processes.
	Optimize batch processes, reduce waste, and improve productivity.
	Implement best practices in manufacturing and scale-up of new formulations.
	Train and manage technical staff.


Qualifications


	Degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or related field.


Salary
N450,000 - N550,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@levitikalgroup.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Technical Manager&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the mail.

Technical Manager Job at Levitikal Group




        
    

        
        Levitikal Group is a leading conglomerate driving progress and development across Nigeria. With a diverse portfolio spanning real estate, construction, energy, agriculture, and hospitality, they are committed to delivering exceptional value to their stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee production processes and quality control
	Improve existing formulations for cost efficiency, performance, and sustainability.
	Provide technical support to sales and operations teams
	Ensure compliance with safety and operational standards
	Establish and maintain quality standards for raw materials, in-process production, and finished goods.
	Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations (e.g., VOC limits, environmental and safety standards).
	Investigate and resolve quality issues and customer complaints.
	Provide technical guidance to sales, production, and customer service teams.
	Support key customers with product application, troubleshooting, and performance optimization.
	Collaborate with manufacturing to ensure efficient and consistent production processes.
	Optimize batch processes, reduce waste, and improve productivity.
	Implement best practices in manufacturing and scale-up of new formulations.
	Train and manage technical staff.


Qualifications


	Degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or related field.


Salary
N450,000 - N550,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Technical Manager" as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Hot Desk Associate Job at Cr8tive Workspace




        
    

        
        Cr8tive Workspace is a dynamic co-working and creative hub designed to support entrepreneurs, freelancers, startups, and growing businesses with flexible and functional work environments. It provides a range of workspace solutions, including shared desks, private offices, and meeting rooms, all tailored to foster productivity, collaboration, and innovation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hot Desk Associate
Job Location: Surulere, Lagos

Requirement
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification. 


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	This is an on-site role, so only apply if you’re available to be physically present.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	No Dms, No Phone calls, No whatsapp Messages.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Lance Trend is a major distributor of technology products and Services for businesses in Nigeria, as well as partners with various ICT, manufacturers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The Accountant will be responsible for managing the company&rsquo;s financial records, ensuring accuracy in reporting, supporting business operations with financial insights, and maintaining compliance with all regulatory and statutory requirements in Nigeria.
	The role requires a detail-oriented professional who can thrive in a fast-paced and growth-driven environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records in line with company policies
	Manage accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely processing
	Perform daily and monthly bank reconciliations
	Prepare monthly management accounts and financial reports
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and budget performance
	Ensure compliance with statutory obligations(PAYE, VAT, etc.)
	Support audit processes(internal and external audits)
	Process and manage staff payroll and related deductions
	Maintain proper documentation and filing systems for all financial transactions
	Liaise with banks, tax authorities, and regulatory bodies when required
	Provide financial analysis and recommendations to support business decisions
	Assist in improving financial processes and internal controls.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;hr@lancetrend.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Accountant Job at Lance Trend Limited




        
    

        
        Lance Trend is a major distributor of technology products and Services for businesses in Nigeria, as well as partners with various ICT, manufacturers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Accountant will be responsible for managing the company’s financial records, ensuring accuracy in reporting, supporting business operations with financial insights, and maintaining compliance with all regulatory and statutory requirements in Nigeria.
	The role requires a detail-oriented professional who can thrive in a fast-paced and growth-driven environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records in line with company policies
	Manage accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely processing
	Perform daily and monthly bank reconciliations
	Prepare monthly management accounts and financial reports
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and budget performance
	Ensure compliance with statutory obligations(PAYE, VAT, etc.)
	Support audit processes(internal and external audits)
	Process and manage staff payroll and related deductions
	Maintain proper documentation and filing systems for all financial transactions
	Liaise with banks, tax authorities, and regulatory bodies when required
	Provide financial analysis and recommendations to support business decisions
	Assist in improving financial processes and internal controls.


Method of Application
